reasoning: The control 3.12.4 focuses on developing, documenting, and updating system security plans, which can be mapped to ensuring that Kubernetes security configurations such as audit logging, network policies, and RBAC policies are documented and kept up-to-date. These configurations define system boundaries and environments, and their documentation is crucial for compliance and security posture. Audit logging and retention are directly applicable as they provide insights into the system environment and interactions.
title: 3_12_4: 3.12.4 Develop, document, and periodically update system security plans that describe system boundaries, system environments of operation, how security requirements are implemented, and the relationships with or connections to other systems
